sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20131" key="blhxa/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βληχ-άς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n20131.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bleater</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄϊας περὶ β.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:145" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.145</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
